code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> Initializing: App starts

    Initializing --> Loading: Load cached notifications
    Loading --> Subscribing: Cache loaded
    Loading --> Error: Load failed

    Subscribing --> Active: Subscriptions ready
    Subscribing --> Error: Subscription failed

    Active --> Active: New notification arrives
    Active --> Processing: User interaction
    Active --> Updating: Mark as read

    Processing --> Active: Interaction complete
    Updating --> Active: Update complete

    Active --> Cleanup: 30 days passed
    Cleanup --> Active: Old notifications removed

    Error --> Retrying: Retry after delay
    Retrying --> Subscribing: Retry attempt
    Retrying --> Failed: Max retries reached

    Failed --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]: Unrecoverable error

    state Active {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> Unread
        Unread --> Read: Mark as read
        Read --> Archived: Archive
        Archived --> Deleted: Delete
        Deleted --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
    }

    note right of Active
        Notification lifecycle:
        - Arrives as Unread
        - User marks as Read
        - Auto-archived after 7 days
        - Deleted after 30 days
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网通知系统画一个状态图。核心是ActuatorController启动后，要经过初始化、加载缓存、订阅消息这几个阶段，最后进入Active状态。Active里面还要细分通知的生命周期：未读、已读、归档、删除。
明白了，Active是一个复合状态，内部包含PLC逻辑处理通知流转。那如果缓存加载失败或者订阅失败怎么办？需要错误处理分支吗？
对，Loading失败要走到Error状态，然后进入Retrying重试。Subscribing失败也一样。Retrying最多试几次，最终还是失败就进到Failed状态，最后把错误上报到TelemetryStream。
好，主干和错误分支都画好了。Active内部我放了四个子状态：Unread、Read、Archived、Deleted。另外加了个注释说明通知7天自动归档、30天自动删除的业务规则。
等等，Active状态本身还需要一些自循环和外部流转。新通知到达时应该停留在Active，用户交互时要先进入Processing处理，标记已读时要走Updating状态。另外30天到期后要有Cleanup清理旧通知。
收到，我补上这些：Active的自循环表示新通知到达，Processing处理用户交互，Updating处理标记已读操作，Cleanup负责30天后的旧通知清理。Cleanup完成后回到Active。
还有一点，Deleted状态完成后应该回到PLC_Logic，形成闭环。另外Retrying到Subscribing的箭头我确认一下，重试成功就重新走订阅流程对吧？
确认了，Deleted指向PLC_Logic形成闭环，Retrying成功则回到Subscribing重新订阅。整个状态图现在完整了：从ActuatorController启动，经过初始化链路进入Active复合状态，内部处理通知生命周期，错误分支最终上报TelemetryStream。
